---
title: "Porównanie Metod Rankingowania"
output: html_notebook
---



```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 1. RANKINGI: MLOP, TOPSIS, GDM
# ===============================================================


ranking_MLOP <- numeric(N)
ranking_MLOP[res$sol] <- 1:N

X <- as.matrix(data_vars)

destimulants_idx <- c(4, 9, 12)
stimulants_idx <- setdiff(1:ncol(X), destimulants_idx)

X_topsis <- X

for (j in destimulants_idx) {
  if (max(X[, j]) != min(X[, j])) {
    X_topsis[, j] <- max(X[, j]) - X[, j]
  }
}


X_norm <- X_topsis

for (j in 1:ncol(X_topsis)) {
  X_norm[, j] <- X_topsis[, j] / sqrt(sum(X_topsis[, j]^2))
}

ideal <- apply(X_norm, 2, max)
anti_ideal <- apply(X_norm, 2, min)

d_plus <- apply(X_norm, 1, function(x) sqrt(sum((x - ideal)^2)))
d_minus <- apply(X_norm, 1, function(x) sqrt(sum((x - anti_ideal)^2)))

topsis_score <- d_minus / (d_plus + d_minus)

ranking_topsis <- rank(-topsis_score, ties.method = "average")


X_std <- scale(X_topsis)

wzorzec <- apply(X_std, 2, max)

gdm_score <- apply(X_std, 1, function(x) {
  sqrt(sum((x - wzorzec)^2))
})

ranking_gdm <- rank(gdm_score, ties.method = "average")
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 2. TABELA RANKINGÓW
# ===============================================================

df_rank <- data.frame(
  Powiat = obj_names,
  MLOP = ranking_MLOP,
  TOPSIS = ranking_topsis,
  GDM = ranking_gdm
)
```


```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 3. FORMAT LONG + KOLEJNOŚĆ
# ===============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

df_long <- df_rank %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("MLOP", "TOPSIS", "GDM"),
    names_to = "Metoda",
    values_to = "Pozycja"
  )

df_long$Metoda <- factor(df_long$Metoda, levels = c("MLOP", "TOPSIS", "GDM"))

order_MLOP <- df_rank %>%
  arrange(MLOP) %>%
  pull(Powiat)

df_long$Powiat <- factor(df_long$Powiat, levels = rev(order_MLOP))
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 4. WYKRES
# ===============================================================

library(ggplot2)

plot_porownanie <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Metoda, y = Pozycja, group = Powiat)) +

  geom_hline(yintercept = 1:N, color = "grey85", linetype = "dashed") +

  geom_line(aes(color = Powiat), size = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) +

  geom_point(aes(color = Powiat), size = 2) +

  scale_y_reverse(breaks = 1:N) +

  labs(
    x = "Metoda rankingowania",
    y = "Pozycja w rankingu (1 = najlepszy)"
  ) +

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9)
  )
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 5. ETYKIETY
# ===============================================================

plot_porownanie <- plot_porownanie +

  geom_text(
    data = df_long %>% filter(Metoda == "MLOP"),
    aes(label = Powiat, color = Powiat),
    hjust = 1.1,
    size = 3
  ) +

  geom_text(
    data = df_long %>% filter(Metoda == "GDM"),
    aes(label = Powiat, color = Powiat),
    hjust = -0.1,
    size = 3
  ) +

  expand_limits(x = c(0.7, 3.3))
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 6. WYŚWIETLENIE + KORELACJE
# ===============================================================

plot_porownanie

ggsave(
  filename = "porownanie_metod.png",
  plot = plot_porownanie,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

cor(ranking_MLOP, ranking_topsis, method = "spearman")
cor(ranking_MLOP, ranking_gdm, method = "spearman")
cor(ranking_topsis, ranking_gdm, method = "spearman")
```
